title: When running podman in hyper-v mode, commands require elevation
body:
### Issue Description

I try to run commands like from `podman machine init` after enabling hyper-v but I get a message: "Command requires elevation".

Is there a way to allow my service account to perform podman machine commands without elevation?

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Start podman machine in hyper-v mode on windows server 20xx

### Describe the results you received

I get a message: "Command requires elevation".

### Describe the results you expected

Hoped to find a way to make this work without elevation

### podman info output

```yaml
hyperv requires elevation
```

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

Window server 20xx

### Additional information

_No response_
